nasb.text: Be very firm, then, to keep and do all that is written in the book of the law of Moses, so that you may not turn aside from it to the right hand or to the left,

esv.text: Therefore, be very strong to keep and to do all that is written in the Book of the Law of Moses, turning aside from it neither to the right hand nor to the left,

cnv.text: 所以你們要十分堅強，謹守遵行寫在摩西律法書上的一切話，使你們不偏向左，不偏向右；

ccb.text: 所以，你们应当刚强，谨遵摩西律法书上所记载的一切，不可有半点偏离。
